item.title: “I don’t want MY TAXES to go to people getting free drugs!!”
item.description: Because it makes infinite more sense for junkies to break into cars and homes, steal property to sell to a fence, get money to buy “dirty” drugs from drug dealers active in your community. That is much more appealing and makes so much more sense /s
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.title: Perspective on the Wrong Things
item.description: Billionaires have no perspective, no compassion, and no clue. They could do something truly great for this world with their money, but they waste it fighting amongst themselves in pissing contests and hoarding wealth that they can never use after they're dead. Not OC. Thanks Glenn.
item.dc:creator: bbrennert

item.title: Binary Black Hole Merger GW231123 With 190-265m(Sun)
item.description: Binary Black Hole Merger GW231123 With 190-265m(Sun) Oktay Yürük aka Oktay74tn, science and tech content https://imgur.com/user/Oktay74tn In 2023, two LIGO observatories detected the gravitational wave signal GW231123 at a distance of several billion light-years. Astronomers interpret the signal as a merger of a pair of black holes with a total mass of 190 to 265 solar masses, the highest combined mass ever observed. This event created an intermediate-mass black hole IMBH with a mass of 225 solar masses. This is the LIGO Observatory in Hanford, USA. LIGO is the Laser Interferometer Gravitational-Wave Observatory, a large-scale physics experiment that detects cosmic gravitational waves. This is the signal of the gravitational wave event observed by the detectors in Hanford and Livingston. Despite its short duration of 0.1 second the signal was detected with a high signal to noise ratio. The two black holes with an estimated mass of 137 and 103 solar masses distort space and time in the surrounding region. Gravitational waves are ripples in spacetime that travel through space at the speed of light. The plane of space distortion is orthogonal to the wave propagation direction. Theoretically, black holes with 60 to 130 solar masses should be rare due to pair-instability supernovae. Massive stars have a very high core temperature of over 300 million Kelvin. Photons are converted in pairs of electrons and positrons. The drop in radiation pressure causes a core collapse and an explosion due to runaway fusion reactions. This diagram supernovae versus mass and metallicity predicts the outcome. Population III stars with a low metallicity and a mass of 130 to 250 solar masses are in the pink region at the bottom right. They are completely destroyed by a supernova explosion without leaving a remnant behind. Intermediate-mass black holes could have been formed by mergers of smaller black holes. Or they could be the product of a runaway collision of massive stars in dense star clusters. Or they could be primordial black holes formed in the Big Bang. The most massive O- and B-type stars with their short lifetimes of a few million years are an important part of the evolution of galaxies. They made a rapid increase in metallicity in the first two billion years after the Big Bang possible. Black Hole Series Black Hole Universe Theory https://imgur.com/gallery/black-hole-universe-theory-DnDKkCp Messier 87 With Monster Black Hole https://imgur.com/gallery/messier-87-with-monster-black-hole-lN1NFr0 New Intermediate-mass Black Hole Candidates https://imgur.com/gallery/new-intermediate-mass-black-hole-candidates-8BILpZp Decay Of The Universe in 10 to the 78 Years https://imgur.com/gallery/decay-of-universe-10-to-78-years-lsPUQLo Massive Black Hole In An Offset Tidal Disruption Event https://imgur.com/gallery/massive-black-hole-offset-tidal-disruption-event-GpF6ZxC First Rogue Black Hole OGLE-2011-BLG-0462 Confirmed https://imgur.com/gallery/first-rogue-black-hole-ogle-2011-blg-0462-confirmed-eros4l1 GRO G1655-40: Black Hole History Revealed https://imgur.com/gallery/gro-j1655-40-black-hole-history-revealed-H6alPgL Sagittarius C: Webb Images Stellar Nursery At Milky Way's Center https://imgur.com/gallery/sagittarius-c-webb-images-stellar-nursery-milky-ways-center-tBO3gkJ Black Hole Evolution to White Hole: New Theory https://imgur.com/gallery/black-hole-evolution-to-white-hole-new-theory-vVie0ya Supermassive Black Hole in Large Magellanic Cloud https://imgur.com/gallery/supermassive-black-hole-large-magellanic-cloud-ktCOEPW Quasar 3C 273: Supermassive Black Hole With Nearby L-Structure https://imgur.com/gallery/quasar-3c-273-supermassive-black-hole-with-nearby-l-structure-hwWuEGn Check out https://imgur.com/user/Oktay74tn for many more astronomy and technology videos.
item.dc:creator: Oktay74tn

item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: My Lulu crossed the rainbow bridge
item.description:
This is Lulu Bass Her cancer became aggressive three months ago
Her body rejected what tumors it could but the colon cancer proved too much.
She was an amazing sous chef, she loved cooking
Wasn't too fond of baths
Loved the car and going everywhere with her sister Treble Clef.
She is a labradoodle but much more lab than poodle.
She could always be found in bed. That's all I would truly look forward to, napping with my dogs.
She loved adventures
She's traveled from the Atlantic to the Pacific. Born in South Florida but she loves the PNW much more.
She loves her littermate sister Treble who came out more poodle than lab.
The beach is their home
Portland roses (Rose City)
She's a service animal, not an emotional support animal. She's trained to de-escalate my panic attacks and stop any impulsive self harming by laying on me. She's just waking me up for food in this picture. She's saved me in grocery stores, banks, malls, and once when I missed my flight because the captain left early. Each instance coming to my rescue when I felt most complete terror. She'd always let me know it's ok, no matter how loud I was screaming in fear.
We've climed up the Colorado mountains, 11,475ft.
She was a little billy goat that day. We scaled cliff faces, swam in glacier lakes, ran across the desert, visited 22 states, swam both ends of the Mississippi River (from the Venice to Bemidji) She's done so much because I wanted her to experience it all. Without her, I wouldn't have left Florida.
Thank you Lulu for sharing your beautiful life with me. 12 best years of my life, I will always love you. Have a Musical Day
item.dc:creator: Piano440
